div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: How it is weaponised in a phishing message

span.p:
Offers a gift or free item
before making the ask

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Secures a small 'yes',
then escalates the request

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Your colleagues have
already completed this

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Impersonates the CEO,
IT dept, or a government body

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Poses as a trusted
friend or familiar brand

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Your account will be
suspended in 24 hours
